SEARCH
Package server.dao

Class WaitlistDAO

java.lang.Object
server.dao.WaitlistDAO
public class WaitlistDAO extends Object
Data access object for the waiting_list_entry table.

Follows the same conventions as ReservationDAO: each method opens a short-lived Connection from DBConnection, runs parameterized statements, and maps rows to WaitlistEntryDTO. SQL exceptions are logged and surfaced as a null/false/-1 return rather than being propagated, so callers signal failure through the return value.

Every read builds on SELECT_BASE, which JOINs the parent reservation so map(java.sql.ResultSet) can populate the entry's convenience fields (park, date, party size, visitor). An entry's queue position is its queued_at stamp, so the FIFO reads order by it ascending. An entry is considered to hold an active offer once grab_offered_at is set; it leaves that state only by being removed (accept / decline / expiry), so a non-null grab_offered_at is treated as "already being offered to" and excluded from findNextEligible(int, java.lang.String, int).

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<WaitlistEntryDTO>
    findActiveByVisitor(long visitorId)
    Lists a visitor's active waiting-list entries — those whose reservation is still WAITING — in FIFO (queue) order.
    List<WaitlistEntryDTO>
    findExpiredOffers()
    Lists every entry whose active offer has lapsed — those with an offer set (grab_offered_at IS NOT NULL) whose grab_expires_at is now in the past, ordered FIFO.
    List<WaitlistEntryDTO>
    findExpiredOffers(boolean force)
    Force-aware variant of findExpiredOffers().
    WaitlistEntryDTO
    findNextEligible(int parkId, String visitDate, int freedCapacity)
    Finds the FIFO-first queue entry eligible to be offered a freed slot: the earliest-queued entry whose reservation is still WAITING for the given park and date, that does not already hold an offer, and whose party fits the freed capacity ("must-fit").
    WaitlistEntryDTO
    getById(int id)
    Looks up a single queue entry by its primary key.
    WaitlistEntryDTO
    getByReservation(int reservationId)
    Looks up the queue entry for a given reservation.
    int
    insertEntry(int reservationId)
    Inserts a new queue entry for a WAITING reservation, letting the database stamp queued_at = NOW() and leaving the offer columns (grab_offered_at/grab_expires_at) NULL until a slot is offered via markOffered(int, java.lang.String).
    private WaitlistEntryDTO
    map(ResultSet rs)
    Maps the current row of a ResultSet (selected via SELECT_BASE) to a WaitlistEntryDTO.
    void
    markOffered(int entryId, String grabExpiresAt)
    Marks an entry as offered the freed slot: stamps grab_offered_at = NOW() and sets grab_expires_at to the supplied deadline (the caller computes it, typically one hour out).
    void
    removeEntry(int entryId)
    Removes a queue entry — when its visitor accepts the grab, leaves the list, or lets an offer expire.

  • Field Details

    • SELECT_BASE

      private static final String SELECT_BASE
      Shared SELECT prefix for every read. Joins the parent reservation so map(java.sql.ResultSet) can resolve park/date/party/visitor in one round-trip. Callers append a WHERE/ORDER BY clause.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

  • Constructor Details

    • WaitlistDAO

      public WaitlistDAO()
      Creates the waiting-list DAO.

  • Method Details

    • insertEntry

      public int insertEntry(int reservationId)
      Inserts a new queue entry for a WAITING reservation, letting the database stamp queued_at = NOW() and leaving the offer columns (grab_offered_at/grab_expires_at) NULL until a slot is offered via markOffered(int, java.lang.String).
      Parameters:
      reservationId - the WAITING reservation to queue
      Returns:
      the new auto-generated entry id, or -1 if the insert fails

    • getByReservation

      public WaitlistEntryDTO getByReservation(int reservationId)
      Looks up the queue entry for a given reservation.
      Parameters:
      reservationId - the reservation whose entry to fetch
      Returns:
      the matching WaitlistEntryDTO, or null if none matches or the query fails

    • getById

      public WaitlistEntryDTO getById(int id)
      Looks up a single queue entry by its primary key.
      Parameters:
      id - the waiting-list entry identifier to fetch
      Returns:
      the matching WaitlistEntryDTO, or null if none matches or the query fails

    • findNextEligible

      public WaitlistEntryDTO findNextEligible(int parkId, String visitDate, int freedCapacity)
      Finds the FIFO-first queue entry eligible to be offered a freed slot: the earliest-queued entry whose reservation is still WAITING for the given park and date, that does not already hold an offer, and whose party fits the freed capacity ("must-fit"). A party larger than freedCapacity is skipped so the queue is not blocked behind a too-large group.
      Parameters:
      parkId - the park a slot freed up for
      visitDate - the visit date a slot freed up for, ISO yyyy-MM-dd
      freedCapacity - the number of freed places the next entry's party must fit within
      Returns:
      the next eligible WaitlistEntryDTO, or null if none qualifies or the query fails

    • markOffered

      public void markOffered(int entryId, String grabExpiresAt)
      Marks an entry as offered the freed slot: stamps grab_offered_at = NOW() and sets grab_expires_at to the supplied deadline (the caller computes it, typically one hour out). After this the entry holds an active offer and is excluded from findNextEligible(int, java.lang.String, int).
      Parameters:
      entryId - the waiting-list entry to mark
      grabExpiresAt - the offer's expiry, as a yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss string

    • removeEntry

      public void removeEntry(int entryId)
      Removes a queue entry — when its visitor accepts the grab, leaves the list, or lets an offer expire. The parent reservation's lifecycle is handled separately by the caller.
      Parameters:
      entryId - the waiting-list entry to delete

    • findActiveByVisitor

      public List<WaitlistEntryDTO> findActiveByVisitor(long visitorId)
      Lists a visitor's active waiting-list entries — those whose reservation is still WAITING — in FIFO (queue) order. Backs the visitor-facing waitlist screen, which shows each entry's queue position and any live grab offer (the offer columns travel on the mapped WaitlistEntryDTO).
      Parameters:
      visitorId - the owning visitor's national id
      Returns:
      the visitor's WAITING entries (possibly empty); never null

    • findExpiredOffers

      public List<WaitlistEntryDTO> findExpiredOffers()
      Lists every entry whose active offer has lapsed — those with an offer set (grab_offered_at IS NOT NULL) whose grab_expires_at is now in the past, ordered FIFO. These are the entries that forfeited their slot and must be removed so the grab can advance; see ReservationController.expireOverdueOffers().

      Equivalent to findExpiredOffers(false).

      Returns:
      the lapsed-offer entries (possibly empty); never null

    • findExpiredOffers

      public List<WaitlistEntryDTO> findExpiredOffers(boolean force)
      Force-aware variant of findExpiredOffers(). With force the grab_expires_at < NOW() check is dropped, so every entry that currently holds an offer (grab_offered_at IS NOT NULL) is returned — the manual "run now" path, which lets the live defense expire an outstanding grab immediately without waiting for its window to lapse.
      Parameters:
      force - true to treat any active offer as expired now; false for the normal lapsed-window sweep
      Returns:
      the entries to expire (possibly empty); never null

    • map

      private WaitlistEntryDTO map(ResultSet rs) throws SQLException
      Maps the current row of a ResultSet (selected via SELECT_BASE) to a WaitlistEntryDTO. The DATETIME columns are read with getString (matching the DTO's string convention and tolerating the nullable offer columns).
      Parameters:
      rs - a result set positioned on a joined waiting-list row
      Returns:
      the mapped entry
      Throws:
      SQLException - if a column cannot be read
